'''Zol''' was a member of a crew of [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned sapients who came to the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] in a [[Factory ship]]. Along with [[Rok]], he used the indigenous [[foonar]]s in an attempt to harvest lumber with the crew's [[Harvester/Legends|harvester]]. The plan was stopped by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]].

{{Char-stub}}

*[[Ewoks (1985) 5|''Ewoks'' (1985) 5]] {{1st}}
